name: Box_Length
notes: Outside length across long face

name: Box_Depth
notes: Outside depth across short face

name: Box_Height
notes: Outside height tub + lid combined

name: Material_T_Box
notes: 16 ga mild steel nominal; measure stock before flat pattern

name: Inside_Bend_R_Box
notes: Equal to Material_T_Box; verify against brake punch radius

name: K_Factor_Box
notes: Mild-steel mid-range; confirm with test coupon

name: Clearance_Gap
notes: Tub-to-lid skirt clearance; also box-to-rim stack clearance

name: Lid_Drop
notes: Lid skirt overlap on tub for dust/weather seal

name: Tub_Height
notes: Box_Height - Lid_Drop + 0 (lid skirt fully overlaps inside Lid_Drop)

name: Lid_Height
notes: Equal to Lid_Drop; flat top + skirt only

name: Hardware_Pitch
notes: Latch and foot pad pitch on box

name: Stack_Rim_Height
notes: Upward rim on lid; also locating rim on dolly deck

name: Stack_Shoulder_Inset
notes: Stack_Rim_Height + Clearance_Gap (downward inset on next box base)

name: Relief_Size
notes: 2 * Material_T_Box; circular relief diameter at box corners

name: Min_Flange
notes: 4 * Material_T_Box; min straight flange length

name: Min_Hole_To_Bend
notes: 3 * Material_T_Box; min hole edge distance from bend centerline

name: Bend_Allowance_90_Box
notes: sheet_metal_math.py at 90 deg / R=0.060 / T=0.060 / K=0.44

name: Hem_Style_Rim
notes: Tear-drop hem on tub rim and lid skirt edge for hand safety

name: Hinge_Type
notes: Continuous piano hinge planning default; confirm purchased part

name: Latch_Type
notes: Over-center draw latches purchased

name: Latches_Per_Long_Face
notes: Two on tub-to-lid; same count for stack-to-stack coupling

name: Foot_Pad_Material
notes: Rubber foot pads recessed in stack shoulder so they don't lift box off rim

name: Dolly_Deck_Length
notes: Box_Length + 2.000 in margin

name: Dolly_Deck_Depth
notes: Box_Depth + 2.000 in margin

name: Dolly_Skirt_Height
notes: Down-turned structural flange on all four sides of deck

name: Material_T_Dolly
notes: 12 ga mild steel; uprate if heavy-load 4-high stacks needed

name: Inside_Bend_R_Dolly
notes: Equal to Material_T_Dolly; verify brake punch radius

name: K_Factor_Dolly
notes: Mild-steel mid-range

name: Bend_Allowance_90_Dolly
notes: sheet_metal_math.py at 90 deg / R=0.105 / T=0.105 / K=0.44

name: Caster_Count
notes: Two front swivel-with-brake + two rear rigid (or all swivel)

name: Caster_Diameter
notes: Planning value; caster selection drives final bolt pattern

name: Caster_Bolt_Pattern
notes: Planning bolt pattern dimension; confirm against purchased caster

name: Caster_Doubler_Plate_T
notes: Reinforcement doubler at each caster mount

name: Handle_Spine_Receiver
notes: Square-tube handle socket; size confirmed when handle stock chosen

name: Stack_Envelope_3_High
notes: Box_Height * 3 + 3.0 (rim heights) - planning estimate

name: Stack_Envelope_4_High
notes: Box_Height * 4 + 4.0 (rim heights) - planning estimate

name: Stack_Empty_Weight_3
notes: 3 boxes * ~14 lb empty each; verify when nest area known

name: Stack_Empty_Weight_4
notes: 4 boxes * ~14 lb empty each; verify when nest area known

name: Kerf_Plasma
notes: Plasma kerf planning allowance; confirm with cut settings

name: Plasma_Bed_X
notes: GoFab CNC plasma bed long axis (planning profile)

name: Plasma_Bed_Y
notes: GoFab CNC plasma bed short axis (planning profile)

name: Brake_Capacity
notes: Box-and-pan brake length (planning profile)
